request.description:
Probes every company across Greenhouse (gh-io + gh-embed), Lever, Ashby, Oracle Cloud, and Workday. Reports any slug returning 403 (private) or 404 (stale) to reports/stale-companies-YYYY-MM-DD.csv with a `category` column (`stale` vs `unknown`).

RECOMMENDED: run one portal at a time using the "Cleanup (subset)" request below. Running all portals at once tends to trip per-host rate limits on large lists (Greenhouse gh-io has ~2,500 slugs), producing many `unknown` rows. If `per_portal.<name>.unknown > 0` in the response, re-run that portal alone.

Nothing is auto-removed — review the report and edit the CSV/JSON manually.
Same endpoint, scoped to specific portals. Valid keys: greenhouse, lever, ashby, oracloud, workday.
